cells.data:
#MacVim Notes

https://github.com/macvim-dev/macvim/wiki/FAQ

defaults write org.vim.MacVim MMZoomBoth 1

for mvim, copy to $PATH - /usr/local/bin

##iTerm

https://www.undefinednull.com/2015/07/31/iterm-tips-and-zsh-plugins-for-better-development-environment/

##ZSH

https://github.com/robbyrussell/oh-my-zsh/wiki/Installing-ZSH

make default shell: chsh -s $(which zsh)

oh-my-zsh: sh -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/robbyrussell/oh-my-zsh/master/tools/install.sh)"

https://github.com/rupa/z

. /path/to/z.sh - into .zshrc

##NVM

curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/creationix/nvm/v0.31.7/install.sh | zsh

##Vim

Vundler: git clone https://github.com/VundleVim/Vundle.vim.git ~/.vim/bundle/Vundle.vim

https://github.com/VundleVim/Vundle.vim

##Sublime Text

Package:

*BufferScroll
*AceJump
*Hide Sidebar When Not Focused
*Focus File on Sidebar

##Development Cycle
*Elaboration
*Coding
*Testing
*Refactor

##Git

https://robots.thoughtbot.com/git-bisect

##Extras

Oceanic Next Color Theme - https://packagecontrol.io/packages/Oceanic%20Next%20Color%20Scheme?\_\_s=giae1182hckkoykzq3xb
